subcodes.first_line: O scion of that embodied spirit! Follow in the footsteps of thy loving father and walk in the path of that servant of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلاله آن روح مجسم پی پدر مهربان گیر و بر قدم آن بنده یزدان مشی نما منقطع
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
